message.illusionist_grimoire.trap.no_spe: This trap has no spell bound to it!
message.illusionist_grimoire.trap.spell_: This spell cannot be used in traps.
message.illusionist_grimoire.trap.no_man: Not enough mana to put the trap.
message.illusionist_grimoire.disguise.bl: You can't disguise into this entity.
message.illusionist_grimoire.picture_boo: There's no entity in the selected slot.
gui.illusionist_grimoire.disguise_select: Click to select • Right-click to clear
block.illusionist_grimoire.spell_trap: Nothing to see here, carry on
spell.illusionist_grimoire.illusion_wall: Creates an illusionary wall ahead of the caster for 30 seconds, making entities lose track of it.
Creates an illusionary wall ahead of the caster for 30 seconds, making entities lose track of it.
spell.illusionist_grimoire.depth_trick.d: Creates a strong distortion in the target's eyes, making him see entities in sizes that shouldn't be possible. Only works on players.
spell.illusionist_grimoire.depth_trick.g: Creates a strong distortion in the target's eyes, making him see entities in sizes that shouldn't be possible. Only works on players.
spell.illusionist_grimoire.paranoia.desc: Casts a strong illusion on the target, making it suffer from hallucinations for some time.
spell.illusionist_grimoire.paranoia.guid: Casts a strong illusion on the target, making it suffer from hallucinations for some time.
spell.illusionist_grimoire.disguise.desc: Casts an illusion on yourself to look like the entity you want.
spell.illusionist_grimoire.disguise.guid: Casts an illusion on yourself to look like the entity you want.
spell.illusionist_grimoire.emptiness.des: Casts an illusion on the target to make him see the world empty. On non player targets it will freeze them in place.
spell.illusionist_grimoire.emptiness.gui: Casts an illusion on the target to make him see the world empty. On non player targets it will freeze them in place.
spell.illusionist_grimoire.fear_bolt.des: Casts a bolt filled with illusion magic that makes the target see what he fears the most in this world.
spell.illusionist_grimoire.fear_bolt.gui: Casts a bolt filled with illusion magic that makes the target see what he fears the most in this world.
